candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A component exists, but it is a generic total depreciation line with no indication that it belongs specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and services'. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocation/double counting.

Explicit operating D&A component exists, but it is a generic total amortization line with no indication that it belongs specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and services'. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocation/double counting.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A section is visible above financial lines, so D&A is not obviously embedded only within 'Materials and services'; however, the excerpt provides no functional split identifying any portion as COGS-related. Conservative choice is to add nothing to COGS_DA unless a more detailed note or functional allocation is available.

candidates.why: Explicit operating depreciation line appears separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, but it is a generic company-level operating depreciation amount rather than an SG&A-specific D&A row. It cannot be safely assigned only to XSGA from this excerpt.

Explicit operating amortization line appears separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, but it is a generic company-level operating amortization amount rather than an SG&A-specific D&A row. It cannot be safely assigned only to XSGA from this excerpt.

variables.notes: R:c. Although D&A is shown as a separate operating line at the same level as other operating expenses, there is no SG&A-specific labeling such as 'Amortization in SGA' or 'Depreciation in SG&A'. Because XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD are already mapped separately, assigning the generic total D&A rows to XSGA would risk functional misallocation and possible distortion.
